attacking_style: Rarely attacks for personal result; when aggressive, initiates decisive moves on cobbled climbs (Oudenaardeberg) to create platforms for teammates. Attack timing aligns with team strategy rather than individual ambition.
team_tactics: Elite domestique delivering sustained destructive pace-making on critical sectors. Sacrifices positioning late in races after exhaustive lead-out work. Bridges gaps early on key cobbled climbs to establish team control.
terrain_preference: Excels on cobbled classics terrain with sustained power demands. Particularly effective on cobbled climbs (Oudenaardeberg) where power and positioning intersect. Capable on both extended sectors and technical sequences.
vulnerability: Late-race crashes after exhaustive domestique work (Paris-Roubaix). Personal result capacity compromised by complete sacrifice for team objectives, leaving nothing for final positioning.
key_patterns: Delivers exceptional sustained pace-making that destroys fields (Amstel, Paris-Roubaix pre-positioning dominance)
Sacrifices position and result late in races after maximizing leader setup (10th-11th finishes)
Co-initiates early decisive moves on cobbled climbs with protected teammates (Oudenaardeberg with Pidcock)
Crashes occur after exhaustive work completed, suggesting full effort commitment (Paris-Roubaix late crash)
Unusual aggression when shown suggests protected status or platform-building role (Dwars door Vlaanderen)
form_trajectory: positive: Consistent high-level domestique performances across cobbled classics, executing critical team tactics with exceptional power output
